seoTitle: Spearwood vs Spencer Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Spearwood and Spencer Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Spearwood vs Spencer Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Spearwood and Spencer Park.
heading: Spearwood vs Spencer Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Spearwood, Western Australia and Spencer Park, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Spearwood and Spencer Park have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Spearwood or Spencer Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Spearwood has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Spencer Park scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Spearwood scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Spencer Park scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Spearwood or Spencer Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Spearwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
